---
title: "Home"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
![](images/profile.jpg){width="80%" fig-align="center"}
:::

::: {.g-col-8}

# Hi, I'm Nhat Minh Nguyen

I am an Economics student at Lawrence University with interests in entrepreneurship, technology- driven business strategy, and data analytic.

I enjoy using data to understand behavior, improve decision-making, and turn messy information into clear insights. This website showcases my class projects, personal projects, technical skills, and professional development.

## Professional Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/dieciocho/nm)
- [Email](mailto:notnminh@gmail.com)

:::

:::
